series_metadata.series_description: When received, hard copy address changes are scanned to the licensee/certificate holder’s electronic file then discarded. When received, hard copy name changes are scanned to the licensee/certificate holder’s electronic file, and the name change documents are then returned to the licensee/certificate holder.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: three (3) business days. Return any name change documents. ; Electronic: three (3) business days. Return any name change documents
